name: Docker Scout parent image built on propagation

statements.__comment: Propagate BUILT_ON from child ontology Image nodes to parent ontology Image nodes connected by CONTAINS_IMAGE.
statements.query: MATCH (parent:Image)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(:Image)-[child_rel:BUILT_ON]->(base:DockerScoutPublicImage) WHERE child_rel.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG MERGE (parent)-[r:BUILT_ON]->(base) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r._module_name = 'cartography:docker_scout'
